name: cmux-agent-harness-loop-plugin
description: cmux-only persistent multi-agent harness loop for general software development. A Claude/OMC orchestrator drives a persistent OMX/Codex reviewer pane through cmux (send + read-screen + file-authoritative verdicts), with shared memory in docs/changes/ and a setup/status/plan/review/loop/handoff command surface. Stack-agnostic; no /ask-family calls; no dangerous flags by default.
